---
title: "shims.d.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/types/shims.d.ts"
loc: 12
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.50
style_score: 7.33
intel_score: 2.00
overall_score: 6.18
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 7.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 3 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
- `forceSimulation`
- `forceSimulation`
- `forceCenter`
- `forceCenter`
- `forceLink`
- `forceLink`
- `forceManyBody`
- `forceManyBody`
- `traverse`
- `traverse`
- `visitors`
- `visitors`
